final_prompt.prompt:
Create an instructional infographic showing how to deploy Hermes in a Docker container and integrate with GLMCodingPlan.

Style/medium: needs a clean technical documentation aesthetic — references in the spirit of Stripe API documentation visual design, GitHub README illustration style, 2020s developer tool onboarding cards; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 4-step numbered sequence layout (1-2-3-4), clear visual hierarchy between steps
Subject: must include Docker container deployment workflow and GLMCodingPlan integration as the core instructional content
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a clear, professional instructional atmosphere — exact tone is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must include code snippets / terminal commands / configuration blocks as visual elements in each step
Text (verbatim): must include step labels "1", "2", "3", "4" with corresponding action descriptions for Docker deployment and GLMCodingPlan integration
Constraints: must show 4 distinct steps clearly numbered, technical accuracy of Docker commands and integration flow preserved
Avoid:
